Data will be made available upon request. Data was cropped in 3 different ways from the original 400 images: (1) DOM dataset: The DOM generated by Agisoft Metashape was cropped into 512 × 512 images, and a total of 1200 images were cropped.
(2) Original image dataset: A total of 2400 images with an original image size of 5472 × 3648 were cut to a size of 1824 × 1824.
(3) Cropped original image dataset: The top, bottom, and left and right parts of the original images were cropped to 1/4 of their original size, and a total of 1600 images with a size of 2736 × 1824 were obtained.
